name: Check of sorting in Palace
fullName: My books module: Check of sorting in Palace

beforeStages.name: hooks.LoggerHooks.startScenarioLogger(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
Then  Account "Palace Bookshelf" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search several books and save them in list as 'listOfBooks':
And  Return back from search modal
Then  Books are sorted by Author ascending on books screen
Then  Books are sorted by Title ascending on books screen

afterStages.name: hooks.ScreenshotHooks.takeScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
